description: Minimal Claude-Code-like Python coding agent. Features track both product work (test framework, harness scaffold) and product-roadmap work (init/audit commands, memory, skills, multi-agent, observability).

state_machine.rule: Only ./init.sh (or a direct call to a feature's 'verification' command with passing output) may set status='done'. Agents may freely move between the other three states. 'done' is sticky — to re-open a done feature, change status back to 'in-progress' AND remove the 'evidence' field.

features.name: 测试基础设施搭建
features.description: 安装 pytest、创建目录结构、fixtures、配置

features.name: 核心单元测试: Prompt & Models
features.description: SystemPrompt 全部方法 + LLMClient 初始化和配置

features.name: 核心单元测试: Hooks
features.description: Hooks 事件系统 (context 压缩测试见 f-test-framework-p4)

features.name: 集成测试: 工具函数 & Agent Loop
features.description: bash/read/write/edit/glob/todo 工具 + agent_loop 端到端 + spawn_subagent

features.name: Context 压缩流程测试
features.description: update / current_tokens / _find_tail_cutoff / _generate_summary / _inject_todo_attachment / autocompact — includes LLM-failure fallback path
features.evidence: 26/26 context tests pass (was 25/26 with test_autocompact_llm_failure_skips_compaction failing). Full suite: 127 passed / 0 failed — init.sh exits 0 in 'all green' mode (no blocked-feature notice). Fix: when _generate_summary returns None, autocompact now skips compaction (leaves messages unchanged) instead of truncating to tail. Aligns with the test name 'skips_compaction' and the test assertion that messages[0]['content'] == 'Round 1' stays intact.

features.name: Phase 0: Harness 自洽 (Dogfooding)
features.description: 添加 AGENTS.md / init.sh / progress.md / session-handoff.md / docs/ / ruff / mypy / feature_list.json schema 迁移 + Phase 1-5 roadmap features。让本项目本身符合 harness-creator 最小五件套。
features.verification: test -f AGENTS.md && test -f init.sh && test -f progress.md && test -f session-handoff.md && ls docs/architecture.md docs/tools.md docs/hooks.md docs/context.md docs/testing.md && uv run python -c 'import json; json.load(open("feature_list.json"))'
features.evidence: 12 features in feature_list.json, schema ref: ./feature_list.schema.json. ./init.sh exits 0 (smart pass-gate tolerates f-test-framework-p4 blocked). All 5 docs present.

features.name: Phase 1: loop init 命令
features.description: Python 版 create-harness.mjs。在用户项目里生成 5 件套 + 项目类型自动检测 (Python/Node/Go/Rust/...) + --agent-file / --commands / --force 选项。
features.verification: uv run pytest tests/test_detect.py tests/test_init_cmd.py -v && uv run loop init /tmp/coldstart --agent-file CLAUDE.md --commands 'echo step1,echo step2' && test -f /tmp/coldstart/CLAUDE.md && test -x /tmp/coldstart/init.sh
features.evidence: 40 tests pass (16 detect + 24 init_cmd). Cold-start: 6 files written, --agent-file CLAUDE.md works, --commands overrides detected commands, feature_list.json has 5 not-started placeholders, init.sh is executable (chmod 0o755).

features.name: Phase 1: loop audit 命令
features.description: Python 版 validate-harness.mjs。5 维评分 (Instructions / State / Verification / Scope / Lifecycle) + JSON/HTML 输出 + 瓶颈指向。
features.verification: uv run pytest tests/test_audit_cmd.py -v && uv run loop audit . --json | uv run python -c 'import json,sys; r=json.load(sys.stdin); assert r["overall"] >= 70' && uv run loop audit . --html /tmp/loop-audit.html
features.evidence: 16 audit tests pass. loop audit . scores 92/100 (instructions 4/5, state 5/5, verification 5/5, scope 4/5, lifecycle 4/5). Bottleneck: instructions (Startup workflow text not detected). JSON output parses; HTML report 3177 bytes valid HTML. Total tests: 126 pass / 1 pre-existing failure.

features.name: Phase 2: 跨会话记忆 + 三层上下文
features.description: .minicode/memory/ 目录 + MEMORY.md 长期记忆 + 三段式 SystemPrompt 升级 (静态/会话/记忆) + memory_read/write/search 工具 + 三层上下文加载 (~500 / ~2000 / on-demand)。
features.evidence: 29 memory tests pass. Total: 160 pass / 0 fail. Cold-start: MemoryStore().append() then new MemoryStore().read() returns the persisted entries (verified with timestamps and search()). Self-audit: 92/100 (unchanged). Q3 detection implemented: is_own_project() correctly returns True for workdir's own .minicode/, False for sibling projects and orphan paths.

features.name: Phase 3: Skill Runtime + Tool Registry
features.description: .minicode/skills/ 目录约定 + SKILL.md frontmatter + load_skill 工具 + ToolRegistry 类 (name/schema/handler/permission_profile) + 权限管线 async 化。

features.name: Phase 4: Multi-Agent Coordination + Lifecycle
features.description: MessageBus (.minicode/mailboxes/<agent>.jsonl) + Task Board (dependency graph) + Coordinator/Fork/Swarm 模式 + 完整 Lifecycle Hooks (UserPromptSubmit / SessionStart / SessionEnd / PreCompact / Notification) + checkpoint 恢复。

features.name: 架构统一：产品全部内迁 loop/agent/
features.description: 原根目录的 main.py / context.py / hook.py / models.py / prompt.py 全部内迁到 loop/agent/。三层加载从 loop/memory/context.py 并入 loop/agent/prompt.py（消除概念分裂）。loop CLI 加 run subcommand 替代 python main.py。
features.verification: uv run pytest tests/ -v && uv run loop audit . | grep 'Overall'
features.evidence: 160/0 tests pass. init.sh 'all green'. loop audit 92/100. loop --help shows init/audit/run. Renames tracked by git (R status).

features.name: Phase 3: Skill Runtime + Tool Registry
features.description: .minicode/skills/<name>/SKILL.md 目录约定 + SKILL.md frontmatter 解析 + load_skill 工具 + ToolRegistry 类 (含 is_read_only / is_concurrent_safe / enable/disable) + Q2 项目覆盖用户全局实现。
features.verification: uv run pytest tests/test_skills.py tests/test_tool_registry.py -v && echo 'body content' > /tmp/x/.minicode/skills/demo/SKILL.md && uv run loop audit .

features.name: Phase 5: Observability + Eval 套件
features.description: 结构化 .minicode/trace.jsonl + 30+ eval cases (10 来自 harness-creator 基线 + 20 产品专属) + HTML 报告 + review→rule 闭环 + ablation 实验。
features.verification: uv run python -m loop eval --html /tmp/eval.html && test -f /tmp/eval.html
